_fixtureNotice: P2-T6 render-golden fixture ONLY -- lives entirely under tests/fixtures/, never a real modules/<id>/traceability-index.json, never read by scripts/validate-kb.mjs. Mirrors modules/cbc_suite_v1/traceability-index.json's real shape (source -> passage -> claim -> decision -> rule -> test -> output) at minimal scale: one rule, two passages (one rights-restricted, one inline-eligible), two test references.
description: Fixture-only source -> passage -> claim -> decision -> rule -> test -> output traceability index exercising tools/review-record/lib/render.mjs's rule-chain section (P2-T6). Carries no clinical validity, safety, or sign-off claim of any kind.
